The user wants to replace letters in an input string based on a cyclic shift modulo 9.
The mapping is:
A=0, B=1, C=2, D=3, E=4, F=5, G=6, H=7, I=8

The transformation rule is `y = (x + 1) mod 9`.
This means:
A (0) -> (0+1)%9 = 1 -> B
B (1) -> (1+1)%9 = 2 -> C
C (2) -> (2+1)%9 = 3 -> D
D (3) -> (3+1)%9 = 4 -> E
E (4) -> (4+1)%9 = 5 -> F
F (5) -> (5+1)%9 = 6 -> G
G (6) -> (6+1)%9 = 7 -> H
H (7) -> (7+1)%9 = 8 -> I
I (8) -> (8+1)%9 = 0 -> A (wraps around)
